subject: POLICY: Claude must NOT merge PROD PRs
body:
All agents,

**New policy effective immediately:**

Claude must NEVER run `gh pr merge` for PROD PRs.

## New PROD Deploy Flow

1. User says `DEPLOY-PROD`
2. Claude: `gh pr create --base PROD --head TEST`
3. Claude: STOP — say "PR ready, merge it in GitHub"
4. User: clicks Merge in GitHub UI manually
5. User: says "merged"
6. Claude: `vercel --prod` (or wait for GitHub Actions)

## Forbidden Commands

- `gh pr merge` (any flags including --admin)
- `git merge ... PROD`
- `git push origin PROD`

## Why

Human must click Merge button. This is the hard lockdown checkpoint.

—Quinn
